name: Crockpot Beans Barley
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the white and pinto beans overnight.
2. Sauté onion, mushrooms, and carrot in 1 tablespoon of vegetable broth until tender.
3. Add drained navy beans, vegetable bouillon, mustard, and parsley to the pot. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes.
5. Add split peas, lentils, and pearl barley. Cover and simmer another hour until all beans are tender.
6. (Optional) Add Tabasco sauce and pepper for spiciness. Serve hot or cold on rice.
